modules.module_title: Introduction to Lehenga & Bridal Garments & Fabric Knowledge
Basic Stitching & Seam Finishes for Lehengas

questions.question: Lehenga ke liye kaun sa fabric sabse zyada common hai jo richness aur structure provide karta hai?

options.B: Georgette

questions.explanation: Silk fabric apni natural sheen, richness aur structure ke liye bridal lehengas mein bahut popular hai.

questions.question: Ek A-line lehenga ki shape kaisi hoti hai?

options.B: Waist se narrow aur bottom par flared

questions.explanation: A-line lehenga waist par fitted hota hai aur bottom ki taraf gradually flare karta hai, 'A' letter ki tarah.

questions.question: Bridal wear mein istemal hone wale heavy embellishments jaise Zardozi aur Gota Patti ke liye kaun sa fabric best support provide karta hai?

options.B: Net

questions.explanation: Raw Silk ek sturdy aur thick fabric hai jo heavy embellishments jaise Zardozi aur Gota Patti ko accha support deta hai, jisse fabric sag nahi karta.

questions.question: Lehenga stitching ke liye kaun sa tool fabric edges ko finish karne aur fraying se bachane ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Sewing Machine

questions.explanation: Overlocker ya serger machine fabric edges ko trim aur stitch karti hai, jisse fraying rukti hai aur clean finish milti hai.

questions.question: Kalidar lehenga mein 'kali' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Small triangular or trapezoidal panels

questions.explanation: Kalidar lehenga mein 'kali' small triangular ya trapezoidal fabric panels hote hain jinhein join karke full flare banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Dupatta ke liye kaun sa fabric lightweight aur easy-to-drape hota hai?

options.B: Brocade

questions.explanation: Chiffon ek lightweight aur sheer fabric hai jo dupatta ke liye ideal hai kyunki yeh acchi drape deta hai aur carry karne mein comfortable hota hai.

questions.question: Bridal lehenga banane mein sabse pehla step kya hota hai?

options.B: Embellishment application

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi garment ko banane ka sabse pehla step accurate measurements lena hota hai, jisse perfect fit ensure ho sake.

questions.question: Agar client ko ek royal aur luxurious look chahiye, toh aap kaun sa fabric recommend karenge?

options.B: Velvet

questions.explanation: Velvet apni soft texture, deep pile aur rich appearance ke liye royal aur luxurious look provide karta hai.

questions.question: Lehenga ke andar volume aur flare add karne ke liye kya use kiya jata hai?

options.B: Can-can net

questions.explanation: Can-can net (or crinoline) lehenga ke andar attach kiya jata hai taaki usse extra volume aur desired flare mil sake.

questions.question: Ek circular lehenga mein fabric ka consumption other lehenga styles ke mukable kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Same

questions.explanation: Circular lehenga banane mein sabse zyada fabric use hota hai kyunki yeh poora round cut hota hai aur maximum flare deta hai.

questions.question: Bridal blouses mein structure aur support ke liye kaun sa material use hota hai?

options.B: Foam padding

questions.explanation: Foam padding ya bra cups bridal blouses mein structure, support aur shape provide karne ke liye use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Lehenga mein 'waistband' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Lehenga ko waist par secure karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko fray hone se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Waistband lehenga ko wearer ki waist par secure karne mein help karta hai aur garment ko finish look deta hai.

questions.question: Agar fabric mein bahut zyada stretch hai, toh usse cut karte waqt kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Fabric ko fold nahi karna chahiye
options.B: Pattern ko grainline ke against place karna chahiye
options.C: Kam pressure se cut karna chahiye aur fabric ko stretch na hone dena

questions.explanation: Stretchable fabric ko cut karte waqt bahut careful rehna chahiye. Fabric ko stretch nahi karna chahiye aur sharp scissors se kam pressure apply karte hue cut karna chahiye taaki distortion na ho.

questions.question: Jacquard fabric ki pehchan kya hai?

options.B: Ismein design fabric ke andar hi woven hota hai
options.D: Yeh sheer aur lightweight hota hai

questions.explanation: Jacquard fabric mein design print nahi kiya jata, balki weaving process ke dauraan hi fabric ke andar hi banaya jata hai, jisse ek rich, textured look milta hai.

questions.question: Bridal lehenga mein lining attach karne ka primary reason kya hai?

options.A: Fabric ko zyada transparent banane ke liye
options.B: Garment ko comfortable aur durable banane ke liye
options.C: Embellishments ko hide karne ke liye
options.D: Garment ko stretchable banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Lining garment ko comfortable banati hai, skin par rough fabric direct touch hone se bachati hai, aur garment ki durability badhati hai.

questions.question: Kon sa fabric type bridal wear ke liye suitable nahi hai kyunki woh easily wrinkle ho jata hai aur formal look nahi deta?

options.B: Khadi

questions.explanation: Khadi ek hand-spun aur hand-woven fabric hai jo casual wear ke liye accha hai, par bridal wear ke liye yeh bahut easily wrinkle hota hai aur formal sheen nahi deta.

questions.question: Ek tail-cut lehenga ki kya khaasiyat hoti hai?

options.A: Uski bottom hem sab jagah same length ki hoti hai
options.B: Front mein short aur back mein long hota hai

questions.explanation: Tail-cut lehenga front se short hota hai aur back ki taraf gradually extend hokar ek trail ya 'tail' banata hai.

questions.question: Waist circumference ko measure karte waqt measuring tape ko kahan place karna chahiye?

options.B: Natural waist par (sabse patla hissa)

questions.explanation: Natural waist par measuring tape ko place karna chahiye, jo generally torso ka sabse patla hissa hota hai, taaki accurate waist measurement mil sake.

questions.question: Lehenga ki length measure karte waqt, tape ko kahan se kahan tak lena chahiye?

options.B: Waist se floor tak (desired length ke according)

questions.explanation: Lehenga ki length natural waist se lekar desired hemline (usually floor ya thoda upar) tak measure ki jati hai, jisme heels ki height bhi consider ki jati hai.

questions.question: Pattern drafting mein 'grainline' ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Yeh fabric ke colour ko represent karta hai
options.B: Yeh fabric par embellishment ki direction batata hai
options.C: Yeh batata hai ki pattern ko fabric ke length-wise grain par kaise align karna hai
options.D: Yeh fabric ke width ko indicate karta hai

questions.explanation: Grainline pattern pieces ko fabric ke length-wise grain (warp threads) ke parallel align karne mein help karta hai, jisse garment ki drape aur fit sahi rehti hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek full circular lehenga draft karna hai, toh aapko kaun se measurements ki zaroorat padegi?

options.B: Sirf lehenga length

questions.explanation: Circular lehenga ke liye, waist circumference se inner circle ka radius aur lehenga length se outer circle ka radius determine kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Fabric cutting se pehle fabric ko 'pre-shrinking' karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Fabric ko soft banane ke liye
options.B: Future washes mein garment ko shrink hone se bachane ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko crease-free banane ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko stretchable banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Pre-shrinking fabric ko future washes mein shrink hone se bachata hai, jisse garment ka fit aur shape maintain rehta hai.

questions.question: Pattern marking ke liye kaun sa tool fabric par temporary marks banane ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Tailor's Chalk

questions.explanation: Tailor's chalk fabric par temporary marks banane ke liye use hota hai jo stitching ke baad easily remove ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Blouse ke liye bust circumference measure karte waqt tape ko kahan se lena chahiye?

options.B: Bust ke sabse fullest part par

questions.explanation: Bust circumference bust ke sabse fullest part par measure kiya jata hai, tape ko level rakhte hue.

questions.question: Lehenga ke kali pattern mein seam allowance kitna rakha jata hai?

options.B: 0.5 inch (approx. 1.25 cm)

questions.explanation: Standard seam allowance usually 0.5 inch (1.25 cm) rakha jata hai, jo clean stitching aur strength ke liye sufficient hota hai.

questions.question: Pattern drafting karte waqt, 'dart' ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Garment ko loose banane ke liye
options.B: Fabric mein extra volume add karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko body ke curves ke according shape dene ke liye
options.D: Garment ko embellish karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Darts fabric mein wedges hote hain jinhein stitch karke fabric ko body ke curves ke according shape di jati hai, jaise bust ya waist par.

questions.question: Fabric ko cut karte waqt, kaun si cheez ka dhyan rakhna sabse zaroori hai, khaas kar agar fabric mein print ya embroidery ho?

options.B: Pattern matching

questions.explanation: Printed ya embroidered fabrics mein pattern matching bahut zaroori hai, taaki adjacent panels par design properly align ho aur garment disjointed na lage.

questions.question: Blouse back neck depth measure karte waqt, tape ko kahan se kahan tak lena chahiye?

options.A: Shoulder seam se bust point tak
options.B: Shoulder seam se desired back neck depth tak
options.D: Side seam se centre back tak

questions.explanation: Back neck depth shoulder seam ke highest point se desired neck depth tak measure ki jati hai.

questions.question: Fabric ko 'on fold' cut karne ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Fabric ko single layer mein cut karna
options.C: Fabric ko double layer mein fold karke cut karna, jisse symmetrical piece mile
options.D: Fabric ko without any fold cut karna

questions.explanation: On fold cut karne se fabric ki do layers ek saath cut hoti hain, jisse symmetrical pattern piece milta hai, jaise ki blouse ke front ya back panel.

questions.question: Agar client ka hip measurement waist se bahut zyada hai, toh lehenga pattern mein kya adjustment karna padega?

options.B: Hip area mein extra flare add karna ya darts adjust karna

questions.explanation: Hip measurement zyada hone par, pattern mein hip area mein extra flare add karna padega ya darts ko accordingly adjust karna padega taaki garment hip par comfortably fit ho.

questions.question: Lehenga ke liye waistband ki width kitni honi chahiye?

options.B: 1 to 2 inches (approx. 2.5 to 5 cm)

questions.explanation: Lehenga ke liye standard waistband width generally 1 se 2 inches tak hoti hai, jo comfortable aur aesthetically pleasing hoti hai.

questions.question: Blouse sleeve length measure karte waqt, tape ko kahan se kahan tak lena chahiye?

options.B: Shoulder point se desired sleeve length tak

questions.explanation: Sleeve length shoulder point se lekar desired sleeve length (jaise elbow, wrist, ya short sleeve) tak measure ki jati hai.

questions.question: Fabric ko cutting table par place karte waqt kya ensure karna chahiye?

options.A: Fabric crease-free ho aur grainline straight ho
options.B: Fabric diagonally placed ho
options.C: Fabric ko unevenly spread kiya ho
options.D: Cutting table ko geela kiya ho

questions.explanation: Fabric ko crease-free aur grainline ko straight rakhna bahut zaroori hai, taaki cutting accurate ho aur garment mein distortion na ho.

questions.question: Pattern ko fabric par pin karte waqt, pins ki direction kaisi honi chahiye?

options.B: Pattern edge ke perpendicular (90 degree angle par)

questions.explanation: Pins ko pattern edge ke perpendicular lagana chahiye, taaki fabric flat rahe aur cutting karte waqt easily remove kiye ja saken.

questions.question: Kon si seam finish fabric edges ko fray hone se bachati hai aur clean look deti hai, khaas kar sheer fabrics mein?

options.B: French seam

questions.explanation: French seam ek neat aur durable seam finish hai jisme raw edges fabric ke andar encase ho jaati hain, jo sheer fabrics ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Sewing machine mein thread tension ko adjust karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Machine ki speed badhane ke liye
options.B: Stitch ko evenly balanced aur strong banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Correct thread tension se top aur bobbin threads evenly pull hote hain, jisse stitch balanced aur strong banta hai. Improper tension se stitch loops ya gathers ban sakte hain.

questions.question: Lehenga mein lining attach karte waqt, kaun si stitching method use ki jaati hai taaki lining main fabric se separate na ho?

options.B: Basting stitch

questions.explanation: Understitching ek technique hai jahan seam allowance ko lining ki taraf press karke lining aur seam allowance ko ek saath stitch kiya jata hai, jisse lining andar ki taraf roll nahi hoti.

questions.question: Heavy bridal fabrics ko stitch karne ke liye kaun si needle size prefer ki jaati hai?

options.B: Medium size (e.g., 75/11)

questions.explanation: Heavy fabrics ke liye large size needles (90/14 ya 100/16) use ki jaati hain taaki woh fabric ko easily penetrate kar saken aur needle break na ho.

questions.question: Lehenga ke bottom hem ko finish karne ka sabse common aur clean method kya hai?

options.B: Zigzag stitch se finish karna
options.C: Blind hem stitch ya double-fold hem

questions.explanation: Blind hem stitch ya double-fold hem lehenga ke bottom hem ko clean aur invisible finish deta hai, jo professional look ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Agar sewing machine skip stitches kar rahi hai, toh uska ek common reason kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: Bobbin thread khatam ho gaya hai
options.B: Needle dull ya bent hai
options.C: Machine ko oiling ki zaroorat hai

questions.explanation: Dull ya bent needle skip stitches ka common reason hai kyunki woh fabric ko properly penetrate nahi kar paati.

questions.question: Lehenga ke waist par belt attach karte waqt, kaun si stitch use ki jaati hai taaki woh strong aur secure ho?

options.B: Running stitch
options.C: Straight stitch with backstitching at ends

questions.explanation: Straight stitch with backstitching at the beginning aur end belt attachment ko strong aur secure banata hai, jisse woh easily khulta nahi.

questions.question: Seam ripper ka kya use hai?

options.B: Stitches ko carefully remove karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Seam ripper ek small tool hai jo stitches ko carefully remove karne ke liye use hota hai without damaging the fabric.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek bahut delicate fabric (jaise net ya chiffon) ko stitch karna hai, toh aap kaun sa foot use karna prefer karenge?

options.B: Walking foot

questions.explanation: Walking foot delicate fabrics ko evenly feed karne mein help karta hai, jisse fabric bunched up nahi hota aur stitches smooth aate hain. Yeh slippery fabrics ke liye bahut useful hai.

questions.question: Lehenga ke panels ko join karne ke baad, seams ko press karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Stitches ko soft banane ke liye
options.B: Garment ko finished aur professional look dene ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko stretch karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko shrink karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Seams ko press karne se woh flat aur crisp ho jaati hain, jisse garment ko clean aur professional finish milti hai.

questions.question: Blouse mein darts ko stitch karne ke baad, unko kis direction mein press karna chahiye?

options.B: Side seams ki taraf

questions.explanation: Blouse darts ko generally centre front ya centre back ki taraf press kiya jata hai taaki woh bulk reduce karein aur smooth silhouette dein.

questions.question: Overlock machine (serger) ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Fabric edges ko simultaneously trim aur finish karna

questions.explanation: Overlock machine fabric edges ko trim karti hai aur ek saath multiple threads se stitch karke fraying se bachati hai, jisse clean aur durable finish milti hai.

questions.question: Agar sewing machine mein thread bar-bar break ho raha hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Thread quality, needle condition, aur machine threading

questions.explanation: Thread breakage ke common reasons hain low-quality thread, dull/bent needle, incorrect machine threading, ya improper tension.

questions.question: Bias binding ka kya use hai, khaas kar curved edges ko finish karne mein?

options.A: Straight edges ko secure karne ke liye
options.B: Fabric ko stretchable banane ke liye
options.C: Curved edges ko clean aur smooth finish dene ke liye
options.D: Heavy fabrics ko reinforce karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bias binding fabric strips hote hain jo diagonal grain par cut kiye jaate hain, jisse woh stretchable hote hain aur curved edges (jaise necklines, armholes) ko clean aur smooth finish dene ke liye ideal hote hain.

questions.question: Lehenga mein zipper attach karte waqt, kaun si stitching technique use ki jaati hai taaki zipper invisible lage?

options.B: Lapped zipper

questions.explanation: Invisible zipper (concealed zipper) ko is tarah stitch kiya jata hai ki jab woh band hota hai toh uske teeth dikhai nahi dete, jisse ek seamless finish milti hai.

questions.question: Bridal blouse mein hooks aur eyes kahan attach kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Neckline par

questions.explanation: Hooks aur eyes blouse ke back ya side opening par attach kiye jaate hain taaki garment secure ho aur fit ho sake.

questions.question: Agar aapko fabric mein temporary gathering effect banana hai, toh kaun si stitching technique use karenge?

options.B: Basting stitch with loose tension

questions.explanation: Loose tension par basting stitch karke, threads ko pull kiya ja sakta hai jisse temporary gathering effect banta hai. Yeh aksar ruffles ya puffed sleeves ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Zardozi embroidery mein kaun se materials use hote hain?

options.B: Metallic wires, beads, aur sequins

questions.explanation: Zardozi ek ancient embroidery technique hai jo metallic wires (gold/silver), beads, aur sequins ka use karti hai.

questions.question: Gota Patti work mein kya use hota hai?

options.B: Appliquéd ribbon-like metallic laces

questions.explanation: Gota Patti work mein fabric par ribbon-like metallic laces ko appliqué kiya jata hai, jo Rajasthani bridal wear mein common hai.

questions.question: Sequins ko fabric par attach karne ka sabse secure method kya hai?

options.B: Single thread se loose stitch karna
options.C: Individual sequins ko secure loop stitch se attach karna

questions.explanation: Individual sequins ko secure loop stitch ya French knot ke saath attach karne se woh fabric par firmly rehte hain aur nikalte nahi.

questions.question: Bridal lehenga mein laces aur trims attach karte waqt, kaun si stitch use ki jaati hai taaki woh clean aur durable ho?

options.B: Zigzag stitch (for stretchable laces) ya straight stitch (for non-stretchable)

questions.explanation: Non-stretchable laces ke liye straight stitch aur stretchable laces ke liye zigzag stitch use kiya jata hai taaki woh secure rahein aur fabric ke saath move kar saken.

questions.question: Appliqué work mein kya kiya jata hai?

options.B: Fabric ke chhote pieces ko bade fabric par stitch karna

questions.explanation: Appliqué work mein fabric ke chhote pieces ko cut karke ek bade fabric par decorative design banane ke liye stitch kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Beadwork karte waqt, kaun si needle type prefer ki jaati hai?

options.B: Embroidery needle with a large eye

questions.explanation: Beadwork ke liye fine aur long beading needles use ki jaati hain, jisse woh chote beads ke holes se easily pass ho saken.

questions.question: Mirror work (Aari work) mein mirrors ko fabric par kaise attach kiya jata hai?

options.B: Thread se secure karke aur decorative stitches se surround karke

questions.explanation: Mirror work mein mirrors ko fabric par thread se secure kiya jata hai aur phir unke around decorative stitches (jaise buttonhole stitch) se outline kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Bridal lehenga mein tassels ko kahan attach kiya jata hai?

options.B: Lehenga ke waistband ke dori par ya dupatta ke corners par

questions.explanation: Tassels ko aksar lehenga ke waistband ki dori (drawstring) par ya dupatta ke corners par attach kiya jata hai decorative purpose ke liye.

questions.question: Computerized embroidery machine mein design ko fabric par place karne se pehle kya karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Fabric ko hoop mein properly secure karna

questions.explanation: Fabric ko embroidery hoop mein properly secure karna zaroori hai taaki woh tight rahe aur embroidery ke dauraan move na kare, jisse design distorted na ho.

questions.question: Dori work mein kya use hota hai?

options.B: Thick cords ya threads ko fabric par stitch karna

questions.explanation: Dori work mein thick cords ya threads ko fabric par stitch karke intricate patterns aur designs banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Aari embroidery mein kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Crochet hook jaisa needle

questions.explanation: Aari embroidery mein ek special hook-like needle (crochet hook jaisa) use hota hai, jisse chain stitches aur intricate designs banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar embellishment bahut heavy hai, toh fabric ko support dene ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Lining ko remove kar dena chahiye
options.B: Fabric ke peeche interfacing ya stabiliser attach karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Heavy embellishments ke liye fabric ko support dene ke liye uske peeche interfacing ya stabiliser attach karna zaroori hai, jisse fabric sag nahi karta aur design intact rehta hai.

questions.question: Cutwork embroidery mein kya technique use hoti hai?

options.A: Fabric par sirf threads se design banana
options.B: Fabric ke portions ko cut out karke edges ko reinforce karna

questions.explanation: Cutwork embroidery mein fabric ke kuch portions ko carefully cut out kiya jata hai aur phir un cut edges ko stitches se reinforce kiya jata hai, jisse ek openwork design banta hai.

questions.question: Bridal lehenga mein latkans ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Garment ko tight fit karne ke liye
options.B: Decoration aur aesthetic appeal ke liye
options.C: Garment ko warm rakhne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko shrink hone se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Latkans decorative accessories hote hain jo lehenga ke dori par ya blouse ke back par attach kiye jaate hain, jo garment ki beauty badhate hain.

questions.question: Thread embroidery ke liye kaun sa thread type sabse common hai?

options.B: Embroidery floss (Resham thread)

questions.explanation: Embroidery floss ya Resham thread apni vibrant colours aur sheen ke liye thread embroidery mein sabse common hai.

questions.question: Bridal lehenga par hand embroidery karte waqt, fabric ko stable rakhne ke liye kya use karna chahiye?

options.B: Embroidery hoop ya frame

questions.explanation: Embroidery hoop ya frame fabric ko tight aur stable rakhta hai, jisse stitches evenly aur neatly banaye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Net fabric par heavy embellishments karte waqt, kaun sa backing material use karna chahiye?

options.B: Organza ya thin cotton fabric as a base

questions.explanation: Net fabric par heavy embellishments lagane se pehle, uske neeche organza ya thin cotton fabric ki ek layer attach karna chahiye as a base, taaki net fatne se bache aur embellishments ko support mile.

questions.question: Mermaid style lehenga ki kya khaasiyat hoti hai?

options.A: Waist se bottom tak loose fit
options.B: Body-hugging from waist to knee, then flares out dramatically

questions.explanation: Mermaid lehenga waist se knee tak body-hugging hota hai aur phir knee ke neeche se dramatically flare karta hai, mermaid tail jaisa shape deta hai.

questions.question: Bridal blouse mein 'princess seam' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Fabric ko decorative banane ke liye
options.C: Blouse ko body par contoured aur shapely fit dene ke liye
options.D: Shoulder seams ko reinforce karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Princess seams shoulder ya armhole se lekar waist tak curved seams hoti hain jo blouse ko body par contoured aur shapely fit deti hain, darts ki jagah.

questions.question: Lehenga mein can-can attach karte waqt, use kitni layers mein attach karna chahiye for maximum flare?

options.B: 2-3 layers minimum

questions.explanation: Maximum flare aur volume ke liye, can-can ko usually 2-3 layers mein attach kiya jata hai, ya usse bhi zyada, depending on the desired stiffness.

questions.question: Blouse mein 'interfacing' ka kya use hai?

options.A: Blouse ko stretchable banane ke liye
options.B: Fabric ko stiffen aur shape dene ke liye (e.g., neckline, cuffs)
options.C: Blouse ko lightweight banane ke liye
options.D: Embellishments ko hide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Interfacing ek additional fabric layer hai jo blouse ke specific sections (jaise neckline, cuffs, button placket) ko stiffen aur shape dene ke liye use hoti hai.

questions.question: Lehenga mein concealed zipper attach karte waqt, zipper foot ka kaun sa type use hota hai?

options.B: Invisible zipper foot

questions.explanation: Invisible zipper foot specially designed hota hai invisible zippers ko accurately stitch karne ke liye, taaki woh fabric ke andar hide ho saken.

questions.question: Blouse mein sleeves attach karte waqt, kaun sa step sabse pehle karna chahiye?

options.B: Sleeve head ko ease karna

questions.explanation: Sleeve head ko ease karna (gathers ya pleats banana) armhole mein sleeve ko smoothly fit karne ke liye zaroori hai, taaki koi puckering na ho.

questions.question: Lehenga mein 'dori' (drawstring) insert karne ke liye kaun si technique use hoti hai?

options.B: Waistband mein casing banana

questions.explanation: Dori ko waistband mein ek casing banakar uske andar se pass kiya jata hai, jisse lehenga ko adjust kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Bridal blouse mein 'cup padding' ka kya function hai?

options.A: Blouse ko loose banane ke liye
options.B: Bust ko support aur shape dene ke liye
options.C: Blouse ko transparent banane ke liye
options.D: Blouse ko heavy banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Cup padding (ya bra cups) bridal blouses mein bust ko support, shape aur modesty provide karne ke liye use ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Agar client ko high-neck blouse chahiye, toh neckline finish karte waqt kaun si technique use karna best rahega?

options.B: Facing ya bias binding se finish karna

questions.explanation: Facing ya bias binding high-neck blouse ke neckline ko clean, structured aur professional finish deta hai.

questions.question: Panel lehenga mein panels ko join karte waqt, kaun si seam finish sabse appropriate hai agar fabric transparent ho?

options.B: French seam

questions.explanation: Transparent fabrics ke liye French seam sabse appropriate hai kyunki yeh raw edges ko completely enclose kar deti hai, jisse seam clean aur invisible lagti hai.

questions.question: Blouse mein back opening ke liye hooks aur eyes lagate waqt, unki spacing kitni honi chahiye?

options.B: Har 0.5 inch par

questions.explanation: Hooks aur eyes ko generally 1.5 se 2 inches ki spacing par lagaya jata hai, jisse blouse secure rehta hai aur gaping nahi hoti.

questions.question: Lehenga ki lining ko main fabric se short kyun rakha jata hai?

options.B: Lining ko main fabric ke hem se bahar jhankne se rokne ke liye
options.C: Lehenga ko lightweight banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Lining ko main fabric se thoda short rakha jata hai taaki woh niche se dikhe nahi aur main fabric ke hem ko clean finish mile.

questions.question: Bridal blouse mein sleeves attach karne se pehle, armhole ki finishing ke liye kya kiya jata hai?

options.A: Armhole ko stretch kiya jata hai
options.B: Armhole ko bias binding ya facing se finish kiya jata hai
options.C: Armhole ko raw chhod diya jata hai
options.D: Armhole ko cut kiya jata hai

questions.explanation: Sleeves attach karne se pehle armhole ko bias binding ya facing se finish kiya jata hai, jisse woh clean aur comfortable ho.

questions.question: Agar lehenga ke waistband ko extra stiffness deni hai, toh kya use karna chahiye?

options.B: Fusible interfacing ya buckram

questions.explanation: Waistband ko extra stiffness aur structure dene ke liye fusible interfacing ya buckram use kiya jata hai, jisse woh crease-free aur firm rehta hai.

questions.question: Blouse ke shoulder seams ko stitch karte waqt, kaun si technique use karni chahiye taaki woh strong aur durable ho?

options.B: Double straight stitch ya reinforcing stitch

questions.explanation: Shoulder seams par double straight stitch ya reinforcing stitch use karna chahiye kyunki yeh area body par bahut stress leta hai, jisse seam strong rehti hai.

questions.question: Lehenga ki side seams mein fitting adjustment ke liye kitna seam allowance chhodna chahiye?

options.B: 0.5 inch

questions.explanation: Lehenga ki side seams mein 1.5 se 2 inches ka extra seam allowance chhodna chahiye taaki future mein fitting adjustments (loose ya tight karna) easily kiye ja saken.

questions.question: Dupatta ke edges ko clean aur finish karne ka sabse common method kya hai?

options.B: Rolled hem ya picot stitching

questions.explanation: Dupatta ke edges ko delicate aur clean finish dene ke liye rolled hem ya picot stitching bahut common hai.

questions.question: Bridal lehenga ki final fitting ke dauraan kya check karna sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Overall fit, length, aur comfort

questions.explanation: Final fitting mein overall fit, lehenga aur blouse ki length, aur garment ka comfort level check karna sabse zaroori hai taaki client satisfied ho.

questions.question: Agar blouse mein armhole bahut tight hai, toh kya adjustment karna chahiye?

options.B: Armhole curve ko thoda deepen karna ya seam allowance adjust karna

questions.explanation: Tight armhole ko theek karne ke liye, armhole curve ko thoda deepen kiya ja sakta hai ya seam allowance ko carefully adjust kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Quality control check mein embellishments ke liye kya dekha jata hai?

options.B: Unki security, finish, aur consistency

questions.explanation: Embellishments ki quality check mein unki security (properly attached hain ya nahi), finish (cleanliness), aur consistency (evenly spaced hain ya nahi) dekhi jaati hai.

questions.question: Dupatta par tassels attach karte waqt, kaun si stitch use ki jaati hai?

options.B: Backstitch ya hand-sewn secure stitch

questions.explanation: Tassels ko secure karne ke liye hand-sewn backstitch ya koi aur strong secure stitch use kiya jata hai taaki woh easily nikal na saken.

questions.question: Lehenga ki length adjust karte waqt, kis baat ka dhyan rakhna sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Client ki heels ki height aur desired floor clearance

questions.explanation: Lehenga ki length adjust karte waqt client ki heels ki height aur kitni floor clearance chahiye, yeh consider karna bahut zaroori hai taaki woh proper length par aaye.

questions.question: Agar lehenga ka waistband loose hai, toh kya adjustment karna chahiye?

options.B: Waistband ko side seams se take-in karna

questions.explanation: Loose waistband ko take-in karne ke liye side seams se fabric ko adjust karke stitch kiya jata hai, jisse fit tight ho.

questions.question: Bridal garment delivery se pehle, uski proper packaging kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Dust, damage aur creasing se bachane ke liye
options.C: Client ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper packaging garment ko dust, damage aur creasing se bachati hai, aur client tak pristine condition mein pahunchati hai.

questions.question: Agar blouse ka neckline bahut deep hai, toh kya alteration possible hai?

options.B: Neckline par extra fabric attach karke ya mesh panel add karke depth kam karna

questions.explanation: Deep neckline ko adjust karne ke liye uspar extra fabric attach kiya ja sakta hai ya ek matching mesh ya sheer fabric ka panel add kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Quality control mein fabric defects (jaise pulls, snags) ko kaise identify kiya jata hai?

options.A: Sirf final product ko dekh kar
options.B: Fabric ko light ke against hold karke aur carefully inspect karke

questions.explanation: Fabric defects ko identify karne ke liye fabric ko light ke against hold karke aur carefully inspect karna chahiye, taaki koi bhi flaw dikh jaye.

questions.question: Bridal outfit ko press karte waqt, embellishments ko damage hone se bachane ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Directly high heat par press karna
options.B: Embellishments ko remove karna
options.C: Garment ko andar ki taraf se steam karna ya press cloth use karna
options.D: Iron ko embellishments par rub karna

questions.explanation: Embellishments ko damage hone se bachane ke liye, garment ko andar ki taraf se steam karna chahiye ya ek press cloth use karke low heat par press karna chahiye.

questions.question: Lehenga mein 'kali' ki alignment mein error hone par, kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.A: Lehenga ki length kam ho jayegi
options.B: Lehenga ka flare uneven ho jayega aur drape kharab ho jayegi
options.D: Dupatta ka colour change ho jayega

questions.explanation: Kali ki improper alignment se lehenga ka flare uneven ho sakta hai, jisse uski drape kharab ho jayegi aur overall look affect hoga.

questions.question: Dupatta ko drape karte waqt, kaun si cheez uski aesthetic appeal badhati hai?

options.B: Proper pleating, pinning, aur symmetric placement

questions.explanation: Dupatta ki proper pleating, strategic pinning, aur symmetric placement uski drape aur aesthetic appeal ko badhati hai.

questions.question: Agar client ka blouse shoulder se slip ho raha hai, toh kya adjustment karna chahiye?

options.B: Shoulder seams ko take-in karna ya straps ko adjust karna

questions.explanation: Shoulder se slip hone wale blouse ke liye, shoulder seams ko take-in kiya ja sakta hai ya straps ko adjust kiya ja sakta hai taaki fit theek ho.

questions.question: Bridal garment ki final finishing mein loose threads ko remove karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Garment ko lightweight banane ke liye
options.B: Professional aur clean look dene ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko stretchable banane ke liye
options.D: Embellishments ko hide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Loose threads ko remove karne se garment ko clean, neat aur professional finish milti hai, jo bridal wear ke liye bahut important hai.

questions.question: Long-term storage ke liye bridal lehenga ko kaise pack karna chahiye?

options.A: Plastic bag mein tightly pack karna
options.B: Acid-free tissue paper mein wrap karke breathable garment bag mein store karna
options.C: Hanger par latka kar open mein rakhna

questions.explanation: Long-term storage ke liye bridal lehenga ko acid-free tissue paper mein wrap karke breathable garment bag mein store karna chahiye, jisse woh discolouration aur damage se bache.
